sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48784" key="qhrozugokamyime/twpos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θηρο-ζῠγοκαμψῐμέτωπος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n48784.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὁ θῆρας ζυγῶν καὶ κάμπτων τὰ μέτωπα</ref></xr>, a word formed as part of a verse containing all the letters, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.538</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
